title: Create: Stein and Spire
description: Create: Stein and Spire is a Create-focused modpack featuring custom world generation, travel networks, and essential QoL mods. Built for friends to explore, automate, and build together!
body:
**Create: Stein and Spire** is an engineering-focused modpack whose name celebrates its multinational origins. "Stein" pays homage to both Create's building blocks and the traditional German beer vessel, while "Spire" nods to Scotland's iconic architectural heritage - fitting for a pack created by friends across Germany and Scotland.

At its heart, this pack centers around **Create** and its major add-ons, inviting players into a world of mechanical innovation. The landscape, enriched by **Yung's Structures** and **Tectonic**, offers a canvas worthy of both German engineering precision and Scottish architectural grandeur.

Never worry about long treks back home - the **Waystones** mod allows you to establish a network of fast-travel points across your world. Keep track of your adventures and discoveries with **Xaero's** comprehensive mapping system, featuring both a minimap for immediate surroundings and a world map for planning your next expedition.

This modpack was crafted with **multiplayer in mind**, perfect for groups of friends looking to build, explore, and create together. As we continue to play and gather feedback, expect occasional updates and refinements to the mod list to enhance the experience.
Key Features:

- Create-focused automation and engineering
- Expansive world generation with custom structures
- Convenient travel system
- Detailed mapping capabilities
- Multiplayer-friendly experience

I hope you enjoy building, exploring, and creating in this ever-evolving world!
